title: Savings Goal Calculator - How Much to Save Monthly
description: Free savings goal calculator. Find out how much to save each month to reach your financial goal by your target date.
keywords: savings goal calculator, how much to save, monthly savings calculator, savings plan, financial goal calculator
intro: Calculate how much you need to save monthly to reach your goal. Enter your target amount, timeline, and expected interest rate.

faq.q: How do I calculate monthly savings needed?
faq.a: Divide your goal by the number of months, adjusted for expected interest. With interest, you need to save less each month.

faq.q: What interest rate should I use?
faq.a: High-yield savings accounts offer 4-5% APY. For conservative planning, use 3-4%. For investment accounts, 6-8% is reasonable long-term.
For goals under 3 years, save in a high-yield account. For longer goals, investing typically provides better returns despite short-term volatility.
